```yaml

#
# AppMgmt Control exposes GetMonitoredInstance and
# ListMonitoredInstances only in this SDK pin. This sample binds an
# existing monitored instance and publishes its observed state
# without creating, updating, or deleting it.
#
apiVersion: appmgmtcontrol.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: MonitoredInstance
metadata:
  name: monitoredinstance-sample
spec:
  instanceId: ocid1.instance.oc1..exampleuniqueID
```
